note: GSD initialized. Blueprint v6 read. 8 clarifying questions answered. Project structure scaffolded. All GSD core files written. venv created. requirements.txt written. LiteLLM config written. Analysis stubs H1-H4 written (pre-registration ready). Git repo initialized. 2 initial commits.
API keys collected via secure_env_collect: GROQ_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY, MISTRAL_API_KEY. OPENROUTER_API_KEY collected later as replacement for DEEPSEEK_API_KEY (India payment block, D019).
Direct DeepSeek API unavailable from India. User confirmed cannot make payments. Decided to use OpenRouter proxy (D019). OpenRouter API key collected and verified.
Blueprint model ID mistral-small-3.1-2503 returns 400 Invalid Model. Checked Mistral API — model no longer available. Using mistral-small-2506 (current dated version, D018).

Gemini thinking token bleed: with max_tokens=150, thinking consumed all tokens leaving content=None. Fix: thinking={'type':'disabled','budget_tokens':0} maps to thinkingConfig.thinkingBudget=0. Also: no response_format json_object (causes empty responses), use fence stripper. max_tokens=200 minimum. D020-D022.

Gemini free-tier key hitting 429 on burst calls (20 req/day hard limit on gemini-2.5-flash free tier). User upgraded key to paid tier (billing-enabled GCP project). Verified: paid tier active, 8-call burst passes 6/8, no free_tier quota violation in error message.
S01 complete. All 4 providers verified: Groq ✅, OpenRouter/DeepSeek ✅, Gemini paid ✅, Mistral ✅. Total cost: $0.0008. Commit b9c0ded. GSD docs fully updated.
